# ixodocs

> Curated, LLM-optimized knowledge base of Ixopay, TokenEx, and Congrify payment platform documentation. 707 indexed markdown files across 5 documentation portals, with YAML frontmatter metadata and full-text search support.

Ixopay is a payment orchestration platform that enables merchants to process transactions across multiple payment service providers (PSPs) through a unified API. TokenEx is the tokenization and vault platform integrated into Ixopay's modules, providing PCI-compliant card tokenization, iFrame-based data collection, and transparent gateway proxying. Congrify is a payments observability and intelligence platform acquired by IXOPAY, providing AI-driven insights, real-time monitoring, and data pipelines for payment operations.

This repository contains the complete documentation from all platforms, scraped from their documentation sites, cleaned into structured markdown, and indexed for efficient retrieval by LLMs and developer tools.

## Navigation

- [Master Index](index.md): Complete map of all 707 documentation pages organized by portal, section, and topic. Start here to find any document.

## Ixopay Developer Hub (191 pages)

- [PCI Transaction API](docs/ixopay/api/pci/pci-transaction-api.md): REST API for processing transactions with raw card data — debit, preauthorize, capture, void, refund. Requires PCI SAQ-D compliance.
- [Transaction API](docs/ixopay/api/transaction/transaction-api.md): Non-PCI transaction operations — scheduling, status checks, options retrieval.
- [Payment.js Methods](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/methods.md): Client-side JavaScript library for secure card data collection without PCI scope.
- [Hosted Payment Pages](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/processing-options/hosted-payment-pages.md): Redirect-based checkout integration, PCI scope reduction.
- [Callback Data](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/callbacks/callback-data.md): Webhook notification payload format and verification.
- [Customer-Initiated Transactions](docs/ixopay/guides/payments/customer-initiated.md): Guide to debit, preauthorize, and recurring payment flows.
- [3D Secure Authentication](docs/ixopay/reference/features/3d-secure.md): 3DS2 integration, challenge flows, transaction indicators.
- [Simulator Adapter](docs/ixopay/adapters/simulator.md): Test card numbers, 3DS simulation, IBAN test data.
- [Provisioning API](docs/ixopay/api/provisioning/provisioning-api.md): Create and manage merchants, connectors, users via API.
- [HMAC Authentication](docs/ixopay/guides/production/additional-security.md): API request signing with HMAC-SHA512.

## Ixopay User Manual (136 pages)

- [Getting Started](docs/ixopay/manual/getting-started.md): Admin panel orientation, first-time setup.
- [Connector Configuration](docs/ixopay/manual/connector.md): PSP connector setup and management in the admin panel.

## TokenEx Documentation (159 pages)

- [Welcome & Overview](docs/tokenex/welcome.md): TokenEx platform overview, client portal access (test/production environments).
- [What is Tokenization](docs/tokenex/what-is-tokenization.md): Core concepts of payment tokenization and PCI scope reduction.
- [iFrame Tokenizer](docs/tokenex/creating-the-iframe.md): Client-side tokenization via embedded iFrame.
- [Token Services API v2](docs/tokenex/the-basics-1.md): REST API for tokenize, detokenize, delete, validate operations.
- [Transparent Gateway API v2](docs/tokenex/tgapi-v2-the-basics.md): Proxy API that detokenizes and forwards to payment gateways.
- [3D Secure](docs/tokenex/3ds.md): TokenEx 3DS authentication integration.
- [Network Tokenization](docs/tokenex/network-tokenization.md): Visa/Mastercard network token provisioning and lifecycle.
- [Browser-Based Encryption](docs/tokenex/browser-based-encryption-1.md): Client-side encryption for secure data submission.

## Ixopay Modules (190 pages)

- [Modules Overview](docs/ixopay/modules/index.md): Module-specific docs and API tooling for TokenEx integration.
- [Token Services v2 API](docs/ixopay/modules/api/tokenex/token-servicesv-2-tokenize.md): Tokenize endpoint specification.

## Congrify Payment Intelligence (31 pages)

- [Congrify Platform Overview](docs/congrify/index.md): AI-powered payments observability and intelligence platform (an IXOPAY company) — unifies payment data, delivers real-time monitoring, and provides AI-driven insights across PSPs.
- [Observability Dashboards](docs/congrify/observability/dashboards.md): Real-time payment dashboards covering authorizations, declines, sales, refunds, chargebacks, fees, 3DS, and VAMP compliance monitoring.
- [KPIs](docs/congrify/observability/kpis.md): Key performance indicators for payment ecosystems — authorization rates, decline reasons, chargeback ratios, fee analysis.
- [AI Co-Pilot](docs/congrify/observability/ai-copilot.md): Conversational AI assistant for navigating and analyzing payment data, generating reports, and surfacing actionable recommendations.
- [Snowflake Integration](docs/congrify/data-pipelines/snowflake.md): Payment data pipeline to Snowflake — sync PSP transaction data, reports, and chargeback data to your data warehouse.
- [Integrations Getting Started](docs/congrify/integrations/getting-started.md): How to connect PSP data sources (Adyen, Stripe, PayPal, Ixopay, etc.) via Reporting API, SFTP, or Webhooks.
- [Pre-Chargeback Alerts](docs/congrify/pre-chargeback/alerts.md): Verifi RDR and Ethoca pre-chargeback alert integration to reduce dispute rates.
- [IXOPAY Integration](docs/congrify/integrations/ixopay.md): Connecting Ixopay as a data source in Congrify for unified payment observability.

## Scripts & Automation

- [scrape.py](scripts/scrape.py): Crawl4AI-based Docusaurus scraper with deep crawling and CSS content extraction.
- [scrape_congrify.py](scripts/scrape_congrify.py): Dedicated Congrify scraper for Docsify hash-routed SPA documentation.
- [clean.py](scripts/clean.py): Markdown cleaning pipeline — deduplication, boilerplate removal, YAML frontmatter generation.
- [build_index.py](scripts/build_index.py): Automatic index.md generator from frontmatter metadata.

## Optional

- [Adapters](docs/ixopay/adapters/): 30+ PSP connector reference pages (Stripe, Adyen, PayPal, Klarna, etc.)
- [Error Codes](docs/ixopay/reference/appendix/error-codes.md): API error code reference
- [Currencies](docs/ixopay/reference/concepts/currencies.md): Supported currencies list
